common.tagline: Run your business with clarity and capability.

seo.title: Tiram — Billing & inventory built for Indian SMBs
seo.description: Run the shop, not the paperwork. GST-ready billing, multi-warehouse inventory, and reports that drive decisions — in Tamil and English. Start free.
seo.ogTitle: Tiram — Billing & inventory for Indian SMBs
seo.ogDescription: GST-ready billing, multi-warehouse inventory, and reports that drive decisions. Built for Indian small businesses in Tamil and English.
seo.keywords: GST billing software, inventory software India, Tamil billing app, UPI invoice, small business billing, thermal printer billing, multi-warehouse inventory, Vyapar alternative, Tally alternative
seo.orgDescription: Tiram is billing and inventory software for Indian small businesses. GST-ready, UPI-native, multi-warehouse, and bilingual (Tamil + English).

howItWorks.heading: Run your shop in 4 steps.
howItWorks.intro: From the first product added to the next decision made — your shop, on autopilot.

steps.title: Add stock
steps.body: Products with HSN, reorder levels, and warehouse-wise stock counts.

steps.title: Bill in seconds
steps.body: Pick customer, add items, print thermal or share the link.

steps.title: Track dues
steps.body: Record payments, age receivables, spot defaulters before they hurt.

steps.title: Decide daily
steps.body: Dashboard ranks what to act on — GST due, dues, slow stock.

india.heading: Built for India, not adapted to it
india.intro: Every detail — from GST e-invoicing to UPI QR receipts to thermal printing — is shipped, not on a roadmap.

items.title: GST e-invoicing
items.body: Compliant invoice formats, GSTIN validation, and FY-aware reports.

items.title: UPI QR on every receipt
items.body: Customers pay by scanning. You see the payment. No manual reconciliation.

items.title: Tamil-first UI
items.body: Not a translation layer — full bilingual UI, including receipts and reports.

items.title: Thermal and A4 printing
items.body: 80mm thermal for the counter, A4 for distributors. Same data, two layouts.

items.title: Multi-warehouse for distributors
items.body: Shop, godown, van — track stock where it sits and transfer in one tap.

items.title: Works on slow networks
items.body: Lightweight pages, optimistic UI. Built for 3G shops, not just fibre.

testimonials.heading: Loved by shops that don't have time to be loved
testimonials.intro: A few words from early customers who switched from spreadsheets and ledgers.

items.quote: We run three counters and a godown. Stock numbers finally agree at the end of the day.

pricing.footnote: Prices in INR, exclusive of GST. Switch cycles or seats anytime — we pro-rate.

faq.heading: Questions, answered
faq.intro: Short answers. If you want a longer one, write to us.

items.a: Yes. You can sign up, add your business, and issue invoices without a credit card. We'll let you know well in advance before any plan changes apply.
Yes. Tiram is GST-native: GSTIN validation, HSN/SAC on line items, automatic CGST/SGST/IGST calculation, and FY-aware reports your CA can use directly.
Yes. The full UI works in Tamil and English, and you can choose the receipt language per customer. More Indian languages are on the roadmap.

items.q: Does it work on a slow internet connection?
items.a: Yes. Pages are lightweight and optimistic, so the UI stays responsive even on a 3G connection. Your data syncs as soon as the network is back.

items.q: Can I print to a thermal printer?
items.a: Yes. Tiram ships with a tested 80mm thermal layout and a clean A4 layout. Switch per print without re-creating the invoice.
Yes. Every business is fully isolated — no shared rows. Authentication is industry-standard, data is encrypted in transit, and only people you invite can see your books.

items.q: Can multiple staff members use it?
items.a: Yes. Invite staff to your business with role-based access — counter, accountant, or admin — and an audit trail tracks who did what.

items.q: Can I switch from Tally or Vyapar?
items.a: Yes. You can bulk-import products and customers from a spreadsheet exported from any other tool. Reach out if you need help with the migration.

finalCta.heading: Less ledger. More leverage.
finalCta.subhead: Stop juggling spreadsheets and start running the business.
